basics.name: Darshak Bhatt
basics.label: Senior Product Leader · AI-driven Growth · CRO Strategist
basics.summary: Senior Product Leader with 10+ years delivering $21M+ in measurable business impact through AI-powered innovation, product-led growth, and CRO across eCommerce, SaaS, and health tech. Founder of Viazene and SuperParent (both seed-funded). Indian Achiever's Award 2021. Open to remote and hybrid roles globally; 15-day notice.

work.name: AI Product Labs (independent)
work.summary: Independent AI product lab — shipping experimental tools that turn AI into durable PM workflows.
highlights: jira-digest: open-source daily Jira summarizer in Python + GitHub Actions, AI-onboarded setup
Intraday ORB Trading agent: n8n + OpenAI + Upstox API with Lovable frontend
Google Flow App: 19-screen interactive PRD + 5 prototypes + competitive audit + pricing model
HiringFlow: B2B HR-tech webapp — AI job posting, bias scoring, AI interviews
AstroPA: LLM-powered astrology assistant (frontend for ChittaDhyana)

work.name: $100M-ARR US-based eCommerce company
work.summary: Delivered $21M+ in measurable business impact via AI-driven search, personalization, agentic automation, and CRO. Owned strategy, roadmap, and cross-functional execution.
highlights: $21M+ measurable business impact from AI-powered growth initiatives
Led AI-driven search and personalization initiatives that lifted retention and revenue
Drove CRO programs across funnel stages — landing, browse, PDP, checkout
Stood up agentic automation for ops workflows

work.name: SuperParent
work.summary: Technology-enabled parenting platform redefining teenage child-rearing. Seed funding raised and VC incubation secured.

work.name: Viazene
work.summary: Earlier 0→1 venture; also secured seed funding.

work.name: Vrozart
work.summary: Technology-led innovation work that earned the Indian Achiever's Award (2021).

certificates.name: Google Digital Marketing & E-commerce Professional Certificate

projects.name: Intraday ORB Trading Strategy
projects.description: Automated agentic trading agent using n8n + OpenAI + Upstox API with technical filters for Opening Range Breakout intraday trades.

projects.name: jira-digest
projects.description: Daily Jira digest delivered to email, Slack, or Teams. One YAML, any company. AI-onboarded setup via Claude Code / Codex / Cursor.

projects.name: Google Flow App — Vision Concept
projects.description: 19-screen interactive PRD and 5 click-through prototypes for a NotebookLM-powered video workflow. Includes competitive audit (7 peers) and standalone pricing model.

projects.name: HiringFlow
projects.description: B2B HR-tech webapp: AI-assisted job posting, bias-elimination scoring, AI interview pipeline with bulk actions.

projects.name: LinkedIn Post Automation
projects.description: AI workflow: Google Sheets → Make.com → GPT (copy) → DALL·E (image) → LinkedIn API with human-in-loop review.

projects.name: LearninGPT
projects.description: Conversational upskilling platform with add-on services like job search. Mini-PRD with JTBD framing and user research.

projects.name: ChittaDhyana & AstroPA
projects.description: Platform for conscious living — astrology, e-pujas, yatra services. AstroPA is the LLM-powered astrology assistant frontend.

projects.name: CliQUE — Housewife Community
projects.description: Community platform connecting housewives with learning, peer support, and P2P marketplace. End-to-end UX cycle.
